description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set within a walled rectangular plot, featuring a flat and angular roof design with multiple rooflines. The property includes a main building with large glass windows, a spacious front yard with landscaped greenery, and a swimming pool at the front. There are two detached auxiliary structures at opposite corners of the lot, likely serving as garages or guest houses, and the entire property is surrounded by a low wall with gated entrances. The landscaping includes palm trees, shrubs, and manicured lawns, creating a resort-like atmosphere. The main entrance is accentuated by a pathway and steps leading up to the front door, and the rear of the property features additional green space and outdoor seating areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat angular roofs, large glass windows, a swimming pool, and landscaped grounds within a walled lot. Includes two detached auxiliary structures and lush greenery throughout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped yard, and swimming pool with the main bungalow and two auxiliary buildings visible in the background.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the backyard, one auxiliary building, and the pool area, with more greenery and open space visible.
description_view_2: Direct front view emphasizing the pool, main entrance, and symmetrical layout of the property with both auxiliary buildings and palm trees.
description_view_3: Side view showing the main bungalow's roofline, one auxiliary building, and the open backyard area with additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass walls
